output.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    h.vbeln AS sales_order,
    h.auart AS order_type,
    h.vkorg AS sales_org,
    h.erdat AS order_date,
    h.netwr AS order_value,
    c.name1 AS customer_name,
    c.land1 AS customer_country,
    l.posnr AS line_item,
    m.maktx AS material_description,
    l.kwmeng AS quantity,
    l.netwr AS line_value
FROM sd.vbak h
LEFT JOIN sd.vbap l ON h.vbeln = l.vbeln
LEFT JOIN md.kna1 c ON h.kunnr = c.kunnr
LEFT JOIN md.makt m ON l.matnr = m.matnr AND m.spras = 'E'
ORDER BY h.vbeln, l.posnr

input.sql:
SELECT 
    h.vbeln AS sales_order,
    h.auart AS order_type,
    h.vkorg AS sales_org,
    h.erdat AS order_date,
    h.netwr AS order_value,
    c.name1 AS customer_name,
    c.land1 AS customer_country,
    l.posnr AS line_item,
    m.maktx AS material_description,
    l.kwmeng AS quantity,
    l.netwr AS line_value
FROM sd.vbak h
LEFT JOIN sd.vbap l ON h.vbeln = l.vbeln
LEFT JOIN md.kna1 c ON h.kunnr = c.kunnr
LEFT JOIN md.makt m ON l.matnr = m.matnr AND m.spras = 'E'
ORDER BY h.vbeln, l.posnr

SELECT 
    h.vbeln AS sales_order,
    h.auart AS order_type,
    h.vkorg AS sales_org,
    h.erdat AS order_date,
    h.netwr AS order_value,
    c.name1 AS customer_name,
    c.land1 AS customer_country,
    l.posnr AS line_item,
    m.maktx AS material_description,
    l.kwmeng AS quantity,
    l.netwr AS line_value
FROM sd.vbak h
LEFT JOIN sd.vbap l ON h.vbeln = l.vbeln
LEFT JOIN md.kna1 c ON h.kunnr = c.kunnr
LEFT JOIN md.makt m ON l.matnr = m.matnr AND m.spras = 'E'
ORDER BY h.vbeln, l.posnr
